subcodes.first_line: The Pen of the All-Merciful doth remind the seekers of the paradise of divine knowledge with Its wondrous remembrances, that haply all may [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قلم رحمن قاصدان یمن عرفان را ببدایع اذکار خود متذکر میدارد که شاید کل از
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @knowledge; recognition of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @transcendence; unknowability of God
